The HTML Maze
by kyrylo

Restless Abbey

Fluorescent lights flicker, casting shadows across sterile surfaces.
Cabinets keep Antarctic manifests.
Designed to unsettle with wrong angles.
Beacon turned tomb for grand ambitions.
Cults funded as corporations.

Compass

N S E W
Go North Go South Go East Go West Go Up Go Down

Use the compass to navigate through the maze.

  • Follow the arrows and numbers out
  • East leads only to dead ends!!!
  • upcels seething over eastchads
  • My dick smells like shit today

  • GO UP
  • I don't care what they say... Im going to keep going east
  • East goes a long way but only leads to dead ends eventually
  • Hey there's a way UP here
